title: Bunkercraft Create 2
description:
Bunkercraft Create 2
With this modpack you can create breathtaking machines and automated production chains.
body:
With this modpack you can create breathtaking machines and automated production chains. 
The entire mod pack is built around the Minecraft Create Mod and peppered with some Create Mod extensions to make Minecraft Create a unique experience.
The modpack also includes some QoL extensions to make your survival in Minecraft easier.
